title: Spring Kickoff Meeting
description: Welcome back! Join us to discuss our plans for the semester, upcoming projects, and how to get involved with the Web Dev team.

title: React Workshop
description: Join us for an introductory workshop on React.js. We will cover components, state, and hooks. Bring your laptop!

title: Web App Architecture Talk
description: A deep dive into system design for web developers. We will explore monolithic vs. microservices architectures and database scaling strategies like SQL vs NoSQL.

title: Spring Hackathon
description: A 12-hour sprint to build something awesome. Food and drinks provided. Prizes for the top 3 teams!

title: Alumni Tech Panel
description: Hear from recent S&T graduates working at top tech companies. Q&A session to follow.

title: End of Year Social
description: Celebrate the end of the semester with pizza, games, and networking. All members welcome.

title: Intro to Node.js & Express
description: Expand your stack beyond the frontend. Learn how to build robust RESTful APIs using Node.js and Express to power your web applications.

title: LeetCode & Pizza Night
description: Grab a slice and pair up to tackle technical interview questions. We'll be walking through popular LeetCode array and string manipulation problems.

title: Fall Career Fair Prep
description: Get your resume reviewed by upperclassmen and alumni before the campus career fair. Bring printed copies!

title: UI/UX Design for Devs
description: A crash course in Figma and accessible design principles. Learn how to translate high-fidelity mockups into functional React components.
